description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, bold graphic print on the chest, back and above the hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water of 40 degreesWash inside out with like coloursDo not bleachDry in shadeDo not iron on printThere's no better way to flaunt your fashion sense than by donning this Christian Audigier t-shirt.  A great casual wear option, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
